patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old female (recorded), DOB 05/05/1952, has a scheduled colonoscopy with biopsy documented for 02/21/2025 (procedure recorded as COLONOSCOPY, WITH BIOPSY). Recent encounters include office visits with Atlanta Vascular Specialists (02/20/2025), Piedmont peri‑operative services and surgery (02/21/2025), pulmonary clinic (04/23/2025), and cardiology (04/25/2025). Social history documents daily cigarette use (Cigarettes 0.5, 50 years), no smokeless tobacco, and no alcohol use (0 drinks/week). Care team members include Shankar Kandaswamy, MD; Sasidhar Guthikonda, MD; Andrew Darlington, DO; John David Dooley, MD; and Mustafa Haroon, MD. Notable conflict: document contains both 'female' and 'Legal Sex Male 06/19/2013 2:39 AM EDT'. Primary documented reason for procedure: "Special screening for malignant neoplasms, colon."
